# protonpass_totp (Data Source)

Retrieves the current TOTP (Time-Based One-Time Password) code for a specific item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "protonpass_totp" "example" {
  share_id = "your-vault-share-id"
  item_id  = "your-item-id"
}

output "my_totp_code" {
  value     = data.protonpass_totp.example.code
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `item_id` (String) The ID of the item containing the TOTP secret.
- `share_id` (String) The Share ID of the vault containing the item.

### Read-Only

- `code` (String, Sensitive) The generated TOTP code.
- `id` (String) The standard Terraform identifier.
